title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
